history.note: Episodes 1-4 are not present in this workspace and could not be recovered (built/saved in a separate session's temporary sandbox). Episode 5 (Battle of Thermopylae) WAS recovered: all of its generated assets live permanently on Higgsfield's cloud storage (not affected by sandbox cleanup) and are cataloged in assets/episode005_thermopylae_manifest.json. Numbering resumes at episode 6, continuing the story thread the ep5 narration set up (Salamis and Plataea).
